manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are participating in a collaborative guessing game.
The goal is to find out whether this grid and another picture only I can see, are the same.
Please describe your grid first. Then, I will provide my description and we can ask each other questions about the grids to figure out whether they are the same. Now start your short grid description with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by the description. Do not add anything else. This is your grid:
‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ X ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ
‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ X ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ
‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ
‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ X ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ
‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ X ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ

message.content: .DESCRIPTION: A 5x5 grid. X's are in columns 3 of rows 1, 2, 4, and 5; all other cells are empty squares (‚ĖĘ).
message.reasoning: We need to output description only, start with "DESCRIPTION:" and then description, no extra. Provide short description of the grid. Probably mention size and positions of X's. Ensure no extra text

reasoning_details.text: We need to output description only, start with "DESCRIPTION:" and then description, no extra. Provide short description of the grid. Probably mention size and positions of X's. Ensure no extra text
